title: EULOGY
full_description: Performed in complete darkness, EULOGY is an exhilarating ride using binaural sound and speech recognition technology to deceive the senses and transport audience members through the bowels of a strange hotel. Your headphones have microphones — you answer yes or no to questions as you are guided downward through various levels of this dreamlike space. A Darkfield production.
ai_summary: Darkfield's newest shipping-container experience installs audience members in laundry carts in a pitch-black hotel, then uses binaural audio and live speech recognition to guide each person on a personalised descent — your answers shaping what you hear in the dark.
